max30102_init.message0: initialize MAX30102 pulse oximeter SDA %1 SCL %2 INT %3
max30102_init.tooltip: Initialize the MAX30102 pulse oximeter. SDA/SCL connect to I2C, and INT connects to the selected digital pin. ESP32 initializes Wire with the selected SDA/SCL pins.

max30102_measure.message0: MAX30102 sample and calculate once timeout(ms) %1
max30102_measure.tooltip: Collect one FIFO batch and calculate SpO2, heart rate, temperature, and signal quality. Use 0 for no wait timeout.

max30102_get_value.tooltip: Read data from the latest sample calculation.

max30102_is_valid.tooltip: Check whether the latest measurement, SpO2, heart rate, or finger detection state is valid.

max30102_reset.tooltip: Send a MAX30102 software reset command. Reinitialize after reset.

max30102_set_led_amplitude.message0: set MAX30102 LED1 amplitude %1 LED2 amplitude %2
max30102_set_led_amplitude.tooltip: Set LED1 and LED2 pulse amplitude from 0 to 255. The default init value is 36.

max30102_config_spo2.message0: configure MAX30102 sampling average %1 ADC range %2 sample rate %3 pulse width %4
max30102_config_spo2.tooltip: Advanced configuration. The default algorithm expects about 4 seconds at an effective 25Hz sample rate; changing rate or averaging can affect results.
